svg.title: Brake Lamp And ABS Signal Flow

g.text: Brake Lamp And ABS Signal Flow
- rear wheel average and slip reaction
Brake lamp and ABS state follow the brake event
2. ESC owns brake pressure and brake lamp state
3. ESC publishes brake + wheel-speed status to ABS
4. ABS derives pressure command / control state
5. CLU and panel show brake-lamp / ABS feedback
